description: Perform a mid-day register cash count in Copper Point of Sale. Record the following physical cash quantities in the drawer: 10 $20 bills, 5 $10 bills, 8 $5 bills, 12 $1 bills, 3 $1 coins, 85 quarters ($0.25), 66 dimes ($0.10), 50 nickels ($0.05), 250 pennies ($0.01), and $10.00 in checks/other. Save the recorded count in the system.
